prompt: Premium Apple iOS-inspired landing hero key visual for an AI app, abstract liquid-glass waves and soft layered depth, large negative space for headline on the right.
scene: Clean studio-like abstract environment with soft volumetric haze
subject: Floating translucent layers and subtle device silhouette
style: High-end 3D render, Apple keynote visual language, restrained minimalism
composition: Ultra-wide hero composition, main mass on left, clear breathing area on right
lighting: Soft daylight with controlled specular highlights
materials: Frosted glass, brushed aluminum, smooth ceramic
constraints: No logos, no readable text, no watermark, premium and calm
negative: No neon cyberpunk, no oversaturated gradients, no clutter, no cheesy lens flare

prompt: Apple iOS-style product mockup: a single modern smartphone floating above a subtle shadow, showing a clean AI assistant app UI with rounded cards and glass panels.
subject: One smartphone centered with visible but generic UI structure
style: Photorealistic product visualization with UI mock layer
composition: Portrait orientation, centered subject, enough margins for web placement
palette: White, light gray, graphite, iOS blue accents
constraints: UI text must be abstract/unreadable placeholders only, no brand logos, no watermark
negative: No Android cues, no heavy reflections hiding screen, no busy background

prompt: Feature showcase bento composition in Apple iOS aesthetic: multiple rounded cards with gradients, charts, toggles, and AI feature placeholders arranged in an elegant modular grid.
scene: Flat neutral canvas for website section
subject: Asymmetric bento grid cards with varied sizes
style: Clean UI visualization, subtle depth, App Store quality
composition: Landscape, card hierarchy from large primary card to smaller secondary cards
lighting: Soft ambient light, very subtle shadows
constraints: No readable text, no logos, no watermark, maintain high legibility
negative: No brutalism, no dark mode dominance, no color noise

prompt: Set of premium 3D feature objects for a modern iOS website: shield, spark, waveform, and privacy lock objects, floating on soft background, consistent visual family.
subject: Four distinct but cohesive 3D symbolic objects
style: Apple-like product illustration, smooth and refined
composition: Balanced grid-like arrangement with spacing between objects
lighting: Gentle softbox lighting with subtle contact shadows
constraints: No text, no logos, no watermark, simple premium forms
negative: No cartoon style, no harsh shadows, no saturated rainbow effects
